top3.sql:
SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

WITH marvel_eye_counts AS (
    SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM superhero s
    JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
    JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
    WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
    GROUP BY c.colour
)
SELECT colour, count
FROM marvel_eye_counts
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

WITH marvel_eye_counts AS (
    SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM superhero s
    JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
    JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
    WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
    GROUP BY c.colour
)
SELECT colour, count
FROM marvel_eye_counts
ORDER BY count DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT c.colour, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;
